imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.heroIntro: This legal notice applies to {appName}. The service provider is {representativeName}, operating under the business designation {businessName}.
imprint.vatLabel: VAT Identification Number according to § 27a German VAT Act:
imprint.contentResponsibleSectionTitle: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 Abs. 2 MStV
imprint.hostingBody: {appName} is provided via {provider}. Technical processing primarily takes place in {dataRegion}.
imprint.odrDiscontinued: The EU Online Dispute Resolution platform was discontinued{dateClause}.
imprint.arbitrationParticipates: {appName} participates in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
imprint.arbitrationDeclines: {appName} is not obliged and is currently not willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
imprint.liabilityBody: The contents of this website are created with great care. However, no guarantee is given for their accuracy, completeness, or timeliness. Responsibility for our own content remains governed by the general laws.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy placeholder exists so legal navigation is complete. Replace this with your approved privacy policy text before launch.
items: What personal data is collected and why.
How long data is stored and where.
Lawful basis for processing and user rights.
Contact details for privacy requests and deletion.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: This terms page is a structural placeholder. Replace with your legal terms for account, billing, acceptable use, and liability limitations.
items: Warranty disclaimer and limitation of liability.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: TravelFlow stores consent preferences locally and only activates analytics after optional consent is granted.
cookies.essentialValue: tf_cookie_consent_choice_v1 in Local Storage to remember your banner selection.
cookies.optionalValue: Umami is loaded only when you choose Accept all in the cookie banner.
cookies.mappingValue: Essential only keeps analytics disabled; Accept all enables analytics tracking.
notes: Tracker script URL is configured via VITE_UMAMI_SCRIPT_URL.
Website identifier is configured via VITE_UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID.
If you enable cookie-based analytics features in Umami later, list all resulting cookie names and durations here.

termsPage.heroIntro: These Terms govern your use of {appName}.
termsPage.heroBindingNote: The German text below is the legally binding version. The English text is provided for convenience only.
termsPage.controllerInfoLead: Controller information is available in the
termsPage.privacyInfoLead: Data processing details are available in the
termsPage.acceptRequiredTitle: Action required: please accept the current Terms to continue using your account.
termsPage.acceptRequiredDescription: You can review both versions below before confirming.
termsPage.acceptError: We could not save your Terms acceptance right now. Please try again.
termsPage.globalForceTitle: Account action required: updated Terms need your acceptance.
termsPage.globalForceDescription: Review the latest Terms version and confirm acceptance to continue using protected account features.
termsPage.globalInformTitle: Terms updated: review the latest legal version.
termsPage.globalInformDescription: This update is informational only (no forced re-acceptance), but you should review the latest wording.
termsPage.acceptOptionalTitle: Optional confirmation: acknowledge the latest Terms version.
termsPage.acceptOptionalDescription: You can confirm acceptance now to clear update notices for this version.
